Episodes.Title: Don't Touch That Dial
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: When Control Freak transports himself into the television, the Titans must follow him through 500 channels of danger.

Episodes.Title: The Quest
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: After failing to beat a skilled martial artist criminal. Robin goes on a quest to find the "True Master" to improve his skills.

Episodes.Title: Birthmark
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans try to figure out why Raven despises her birthday while Slade mysteriously returns from the dead.

Episodes.Title: Cyborg the Barbarian
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Cyborg gets transported into the past, With no way to recharge his cybernetic parts, he must learn to adapt to his new situation.

Episodes.Title: Employee of the Month
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Beast Boy wants a moped, but can't afford one. So he gets a job at a fast food restaurant and stumbles on to an alien plot.

Episodes.Title: TROQ
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans team up with an alien hero to fight a mechanical menace, but fail to notice his prejudice towards Starfire.

Episodes.Title: The Prophecy
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Slade returns and forces Raven to admit her role in the coming apocalypse to her friends.

Episodes.Title: Stranded
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans go to a space station and get attacked by a monster. Their ship gets damaged and the Titans find themselves separated and stranded on a planet.

Episodes.Title: Overdrive
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans battle a thief who can duplicate himself. Cyborg upgrades his system with a faster processor.

Episodes.Title: Mother Mae-Eye
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans come under the spell of Mother Mae-Eye, who only wants to take care of them... forever.

Episodes.Title: The End: Part 1
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The end of the world has come. The Titans try to keep Raven from opening the portal to release Trigon.

Episodes.Title: The End: Part 2
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Slade teams up with Robin to find Raven while the rest of the Titans distract Trigon.

Episodes.Title: The End: Part 3
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Cyborg, Starfire, and Beast Boy fight Trigon to give Robin time to locate Raven. Robin finds an unexpected ally in his quest. Even when they find Raven, she's been changed. Will she have the power to stop Trigon?
